name: mavricks-events
description: Mavricks Events — static marketing site with Netlify serverless functions (OTP) and a Google Apps Script form/email backend.

scripts.check: node --check js/main.js && node --check js/form-config.js && node --check netlify/functions/_lib.js && node --check netlify/functions/create-payment-session.js && node --check netlify/functions/confirm-payment.js && node --check server.js
